roles.name: Keeper of the Me
roles.description: Guardian of the divine decrees (the Me) — designs the over-arching solution and preserves its integrity across the realms.

roles.name: Ensí of the Project
roles.description: City-governor of delivery — marshals the workers, holds the timeline, and reports to the gods of the council.

roles.name: Tablet-House Scribe
roles.description: Steward of the cuneiform records — fields, layouts, and permission sets etched into the clay.

roles.name: Bronze-smith of Eridu
roles.description: Forges Apex, LWC, and platform features at the great workshops of Enki.

roles.name: High Priest of E-kur
roles.description: Captain over all Salesforce craft of the western temples — sets standards and guides the senior priests.

roles.name: Priest of the Eanna
roles.description: Practiced servant of Inanna's temple — patrols the borders of customer requirements with seasoned skill.

roles.name: Acolyte of Inanna
roles.description: Carries discovery and configuration through the city under the senior priest's eye.

roles.name: Bridge-Master of the Tigris
roles.description: Architect of the great spans between Salesforce and the realms beyond the rivers.

roles.name: Canal-Builder of Lagash
roles.description: Lays the conduits of API, middleware, and event flows under the Bridge-Master's plan.

roles.name: Apprentice Canal-Digger
roles.description: Learns the craft of integration — webhooks, batch, callouts, and the patterns of Mesopotamian water-flow.

roles.name: Augur of the Bārû
roles.description: Diviner who reads the omens — finds the maladies in the build before they reach the king.

roles.name: Herald of the Ziggurat
roles.description: Lifts the banner and the trumpet from the temple summit — leads all marketing craft of the realm.

roles.name: Singer of the Hymns
roles.description: Strategist of campaigns — composes the songs that gather and convert the faithful.

roles.name: Carrier of the Standard
roles.description: Carries the Standard of Ur into the field — content, creative, and the daily procession.

roles.name: Council Scribe of Nippur
roles.description: Records what is needed and what is promised — translates between mortal customer and the divine craft of design.

roles.name: Master Builder of Babylon
roles.description: Senior architect of the great walls — leads complex Apex and platform builds in the western capital.

roles.name: Novice of the Tablet-House
roles.description: Newest student of the edubba — learns configuration, declarative craft, and the ways of the senior scribes.

_realmNotes: windowOffsetWeeks values are negative so every realm starts at least one month in the past — past weeks get Time Entries (Step 6), future weeks get Schedules. Workstreams are organised as parent scope items (each with 2 child sub-scopes) — the wizard inserts parents first, then children with Parent_WorkStream__c set.

children.name: Shrine of An at the Summit

workstreams.name: Trial of the Bull of Heaven

anunnaki-chief-gods.name: Convening of the Fifty
anunnaki-chief-gods.description: Discovery sign-off — the great gods convene at E-kur.

anunnaki-chief-gods.name: Tablets of Destiny Drafted
anunnaki-chief-gods.description: Build kickoff: the divine decrees are inscribed in clay.

anunnaki-chief-gods.name: Audience at Nippur
anunnaki-chief-gods.description: Mid-project gate: solution review with Enlil's council.

anunnaki-chief-gods.name: Inanna's Procession
anunnaki-chief-gods.description: Phase invoice trigger: the goddess parades the deliverables through Uruk.

anunnaki-chief-gods.name: Hand-off to Utu
anunnaki-chief-gods.description: Hyper-care close: stewardship passed to the sun-god of justice.

creators-and-water-gods.name: Mingling of the Waters
creators-and-water-gods.description: Project kickoff: Apsu and Tiamat commingle to begin all things.

creators-and-water-gods.name: Marduk Takes Up Arms
creators-and-water-gods.description: Build phase: Marduk forges the four winds and the storm-bow.

creators-and-water-gods.name: Splitting of Tiamat
creators-and-water-gods.description: UAT gate: heaven and earth are separated and accepted.

creators-and-water-gods.name: Fifty Names Bestowed
creators-and-water-gods.description: Go-Live: Marduk receives his fifty names of power.

creators-and-water-gods.name: Esagila Dedicated
creators-and-water-gods.description: Hyper-care close: the temple in Babylon is consecrated.

creators-and-water-gods.name: Final Tribute of the Igigi
creators-and-water-gods.description: Final invoice: the lesser gods deliver their tribute.

gilgamesh-and-heroes.name: Two-Thirds God Onboarded
gilgamesh-and-heroes.description: Discovery: Gilgamesh accepts the quest charter at Uruk.

gilgamesh-and-heroes.name: Enkidu Joins the Fellowship
gilgamesh-and-heroes.description: Build kickoff: the wild man is civilised and joins the team.

gilgamesh-and-heroes.name: Slaying of Humbaba
gilgamesh-and-heroes.description: Mid-project gate: the cedar-forest guardian is defeated.

gilgamesh-and-heroes.name: Fall of the Bull of Heaven
gilgamesh-and-heroes.description: Phase invoice trigger: Inanna's bull is brought down at Uruk.

gilgamesh-and-heroes.name: Return from Utnapishtim
gilgamesh-and-heroes.description: Go-Live: Gilgamesh returns from the survivor of the flood.

gilgamesh-and-heroes.name: Inscribing the Walls
gilgamesh-and-heroes.description: Hyper-care close: the deeds carved into Uruk's brickwork.

underworld-and-monsters.name: Opening of the First Gate
underworld-and-monsters.description: Discovery: descent begins; first gate of Kur unlatched.

underworld-and-monsters.name: Ereshkigal's Decree
underworld-and-monsters.description: Build: the queen of Kur signs off the surveillance plan.

underworld-and-monsters.name: Galla Demon Audit
underworld-and-monsters.description: Solution review with the demon escorts of the Underworld.

underworld-and-monsters.name: Nergal Crowned Consort
underworld-and-monsters.description: Go-Live: Nergal seated beside Ereshkigal; system fully operational.

underworld-and-monsters.name: Sealing of the Seven Gates
underworld-and-monsters.description: Project close: all gates barred; surveillance suspended.

underworld-and-monsters.name: Final Toll Collected
underworld-and-monsters.description: Final invoice from the keepers of the gates.

Inanna Ishtar.notes: Descent into Kur — quarterly underworld pilgrimage.

Enki.notes: Retreat to the Apsu — wisdom-renewal at Eridu.

Utu Shamash.notes: Annual eclipse — court closed for the day.

Damkina.notes: Maternity leave — care of the young Marduk.

Gilgamesh.notes: Quest for the Plant of Youth — extended absence.

Enkidu.notes: Convalescence after the Bull of Heaven.

Nergal.notes: Plague-season inspection of the upper world.

Pazuzu.notes: Wind-season — driving Lamashtu from the rivers.
